title: Latvian Defence Minister Sprūds under pressure over drone incident
summary_full: Latvian Defence Minister Andris Sprūds (Progressives) appears to be under considerable political pressure with opposition parties calling for his dismissal and his coalition partners reluctant to offer him unambiguous backing over his handling of recent drone incursion incidents.
